api_http_request_duration_seconds.help: HTTP request duration histogram exposed with a bare base name (Prometheus metadata returns the base; queryable series are _bucket/_sum/_count).

api_http_requests_total.help: Total HTTP requests processed by the API, labelled with promhttp code/handler conventions.

api_tls_not_after_timestamp.help: Unix timestamp at which the TLS certificate becomes invalid.

cache_client_hits_total.help: Total cache client hit/miss events; has client in name but no HTTP-status label (look-alike negative for service_client_http).

cache_items_evicted_total.help: Cache eviction counter; look-alike for cache_hits (wrong suffix).

consumer_processed_total.help: Total messages processed by the consumer worker; not a Kafka lag gauge.

db_query_count_total.help: Total database queries executed; name contains query but type is counter not histogram (look-alike negative for service_db_query_latency).

db_query_duration_seconds.help: Duration of database query executions in seconds, instrumented at the repository layer.

db_request_size_bytes.help: Database query payload size histogram; labelled by query_type, not method/handler.

db_response_size_bytes.help: Database response payload size histogram; labelled by query_type, not method/handler.

go_gc_duration_seconds.help: A summary of the pause duration of garbage collection cycles.

go_memstats_alloc_bytes.help: Number of bytes allocated and still in use by the Go heap; look-alike negative for service_memory (not in memoryMetricNames closed set).

go_goroutines.help: Number of goroutines that currently exist.

go_sql_stats_connections_in_use.help: Number of connections currently in use by sql.DB (prometheus/client_golang go_sql_stats instrumentation).

go_sql_stats_connections_max.help: Maximum number of open connections configured for sql.DB (sql.DB.SetMaxOpenConns).

grpc_client_retries_total.help: Client-side retry counter; carries no grpc_method/grpc_service labels (regression look-alike).

grpc_server_handled_total.help: Total number of RPCs completed on the server, regardless of success or failure.

grpc_server_handling_seconds.help: Histogram of response latency (seconds) of gRPC calls handled by the server.

http_client_requests_total.help: Total outbound HTTP client requests made by this service, labelled with target host and HTTP status code.

http_request_size_bytes.help: HTTP request body size histogram labelled by method and handler.

http_response_size_bytes.help: HTTP response body size histogram labelled by method and handler.

kafka_consumergroup_lag.help: Number of messages a consumer group is behind the latest offset, per partition (kafka_exporter).

kafka_consumergroup_lag_sum.help: Aggregate consumer group lag summed across all partitions (kafka_exporter).

probe_ssl_earliest_cert_expiry.help: Earliest SSL cert expiry from blackbox_exporter; look-alike for tls_expiry (wrong suffix length).

queue_items_received_total.help: Items the queue worker received from upstream; status holds domain values like accepted/rejected, NOT HTTP status codes.

queue_processing_duration_seconds_bucket.help: Queue item processing duration bucket; no HTTP-shape labels.

redis_cache_hits_total.help: Total number of Redis cache hits.

redis_cache_misses_total.help: Total number of Redis cache misses.

worker_jobs_completed_total.help: Jobs completed with status label; look-alike for job_success (shape B, wrong name pattern).

worker_jobs_succeeded_total.help: Total background jobs that completed successfully.
